title: Junior Instructional Designer at NIT Trichy Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at NIT Trichy Global Group
jsonLd.description:
NIT Trichy Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIT Trichy Global Group:
NIT Trichy Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy Global Group!
